testimonials.quote: The content and presenters were fabulous, as always!

This is my second IAML seminar in as many years. The quality of the content covered is unmatched for the HR training industry. Your instructors are top-notch and your seminars draw HR professionals from some of the largest and most innovative organizations. Keep up the good work!
The class was delivered creatively and exceptionally well. I added to my knowledge and learned new facts to help me feel better prepared to take the PHR exam.
The classroom participation was excellent and allowed us to share situations and get other perspectives in a safe space. This was the best employee relations seminar that I've ever attended.
The presenters made a rather intensive 5 days not only educational and instructional but interesting and enjoyable as well. Best seminar in HR I've ever attended.

Both of the presenters were fantastic!  Brenda Heinicke’s ‘Friday Free for All’ was a terrific way for us to discuss specific topics affecting our individual workplaces.  The personal experiences shared by Patrick Scully of working for the NLRB (labor vs. employer) were fascinating.
The instructors did a fantastic job of presenting the information and maintaining participant engagement.

The instructor's presentation skills were top notch; and her ability to convey the importance of both the employee's point of view, while not losing sight of effective business management decisions was good to see. Her presentation was worth the travel and expense.
I have been in HR for 15 years and attended a lot of seminars, this was my first IAML seminar and you can bet my budget dollars were well-spent. I'll continue to look for your seminars first!

I would highly recommend the Certificate in Employee Relations Law Program to my colleagues in the public sector. The speakers presented each legal theory covered in the program with practical examples of how they apply to the workplace of today.
testimonials.authorTitle: Assistant Chief of the Fire Department

testimonials.quote: This was by far the most informative and educational seminar I have ever attended, everything was fantastic!. Thank you!
I absolutely loved the instructors! The course provided so much valuable information.

I am so impressed with your organization each time I attend. IAML is very organized and truly a leader in their field. Ray does an outstanding job, he keeps the seminar moving in an exciting and motivational way.
Great job! The information will assist me and my company in effectively administering our employee benefits.
testimonials.authorTitle: Sr. Vice President & Chief Administrative Officer

testimonials.quote: Excellent seminar! This is the second IAML class I have attended. As a new manager, the information presented was invaluable! The instructor was amazing!  I will definitely be back!
Both speakers were excellent. Their real life experiences and examples helped me to relate. The interaction in/within class was very helpful. Very informative!

I thoroughly enjoyed the program. I appreciate the role playing and explanations, as it helps to determine which scenario may work best for a situation, depending on the circumstances. It’s always helpful to hear explanations of why one approach may work better than another.
The training both was excellent both in content as well as presentation. I believe the strength of the program lay in the instructors used. All the instructors were fantastic!
This was the most enjoyable seminar I have ever attended. Wonderful instructors, excellent location and great materials.
Our instructor was a great presenter with great real life examples. His summaries of significant federal employment law were invaluable.
testimonials.authorTitle: Sr. Regional HR Manager & HR Counsel

testimonials.quote: The course allowed me to review the items I already knew and learn the latest and greatest in employment law. Brenda did an outstanding job of ensuring we understood the materials and paced the class appropriately. She brought real-life experience to this course.
I thought the program was excellent. The content and speakers especially were the best I've experienced in my educational and professional career.

The instructors were outstanding. They know the law and they understand the day-to-day implications for managers and HR professionals. The cases were fascinating, the implications were clear and all of the speakers had a wonderful sense of humor.

Brenda Heinicke was fantastic! She did an amazing job of presenting the information clearly and concisely. Her high energy level engaged us in thought provoking conversations instead of ‘talking at us’ like many instructors tend to do.

I think that this program is one of the best that you could ever attend as a human resource professional. It is comprehensive and thorough. I left this training with the human resource equipment I need.
testimonials.company: Office of Regulation Policy and Management, Department of Veterans Affairs

testimonials.quote: Great update as always. I get more from these 2 days of interaction than in any other seminar. Will be sending many in my group to IAML offerings this year. Ray has amazing knowledge and his style allows for great interactive discussions and debates.
I enjoyed the seminar, particularly how the instructors tied case law to various issues. It taught me that even 'rock solid' cases can end up being a nightmare, especially when juries get involved.
I felt these classes were very helpful and I have already implemented at least five things that I learned.
The content was current, relevant and very practical. I appreciated the interactive format and the opportunity to network with other professionals facing similar challenges.
Frankly, this was one of the most informative continuing legal education seminars that I have attended.
Of all the IAML seminars I have attended, this was by far the best and most informative, especially to HR professionals. I was very pleased with the entire program.

I really liked the presenter and it was definitely worth my time. It was interactive and gave me some really good skills and knowledge to take with me. Felt like the presenter hit on all the important items that really related to what HR does.

I loved that it was a refresh of the laws and we discusses real life examples that had already happened... plus, classmates shared their current situations that we talked through. Instructors were very interesting, which made the class much more enjoyable than I was expecting.
Very good seminar; one that I would highly recommend to all HR professionals. I will attend more IAML sessions… worth every penny. Even the $60 I lost playing blackjack!

I found this to be the most interesting and helpful seminar that I have ever attended. The instructors were phenomenal and did an incredible job of providing real life examples to illustrate the information they were conveying.
Your presenter is a great instructor.  He made the session fun and relevant to the real world.

The Advanced Certificate in Employment Law Conference was simply outstanding! This well-balanced program of case review and discussion adds so much value to any business.  I strongly recommend this program to any business wishing to mitigate potential risk.
Really enjoyed Ray's presentation; particularly the way he shared his viewpoint when describing today's labor and employment law environment!

The old Raiders had a motto – 'Commitment to Excellence'. The same can be said about IAML's seminars. From the HR Essentials to the Advanced Employment Law Conference, you get nothing less than excellence. You can trust and respect the quality of the presenters. Keep up the great work IAML!
It was great learning the information, but also very useful hearing from others attending the class. I learned a wealth of information.

Both blocks provided information I needed. Both presenters were very knowledgeable and presented the material in a very interesting format. The hands-on segments were most helpful because it made me stop, think and apply the information.
I learned so much more from this law seminar than I have ever learned in other seminars.
I really enjoyed the seminar. I learned a great deal and will definitely be able to apply what I learned once I’m back in the office.

I was extremely happy with the presenters. The information exceeded my expectations and the other participants were very helpful in sharing their experiences. I signed up for this course after researching ‘human resources training’ on the internet. I reviewed a lot of different training programs and determined the information on your website was the most thorough and comprehensive.
I thought the conference was a great way to get the latest information. I also appreciate the fact that this is an advanced course that doesn't spend time going over the basics of employment law.

I thought the seminar was very informative! I will definitely utilize my new skills I have acquired during the training. I would highly recommend others to use IAML as their training/learning tool. I cannot wait for the next conference!
I truly enjoyed this class. This is one of the best courses I have taken. Thank you!
This is the third IAML Advanced Conference I have attended and they have all been outstanding. The instructors continue to provide an excellent program with valuable information.
This is the first time I’ve attended this Advanced Benefits seminar and I plan to attend again.
This was my first seminar with IAML and I was very impressed! The speakers were great and the sessions were very informative. I will definitely attend again!

The class was very useful to me, I was able to take what I learned and apply it back at my job. A lot of times training seminars only cover the basics – this seminar really got down to the detail of things which was great.
testimonials.authorTitle: Vice President People Strategist and Global Culture Transformation

testimonials.quote: The instructors did an excellent job of keeping everyone engaged and focused. The information was very practically oriented.

The instructors were most excellent, the course materials were solid, the on-site administration was very effective, the facilities (classroom, hotel, food, atmosphere, weather) were wonderful. I can think of nothing that needed improvement.  I hope to attend another of your seminars. Keep up the good work!

It’s always good to come back to IAML to get updated on the newest rulings as well as to refresh my knowledge of employment law.  The instructors were very good and their presentation skills were excellent.  Sometimes just reading ‘the law’ can be so boring.  IAML’s courses are far from boring!  Thanks again for a great class!
I highly enjoyed this seminar. All of the presenters were extremely knowledgeable and very easy to talk with.
The seminar was very insightful and the content well organized. The facilitators are to be commended for such an exceptionally delivered seminar!

The information covered in this program was excellent! The speakers were wonderful. They kept the program fresh and interesting. It just seems it's never enough time to go over all the changed in this ever-changing field.
The instructors were very knowledgeable and presented the information in a way that everyone could understand. I also enjoyed being able to network.
I rated Brenda Heinicke 'excellent', only because 'super' is not an option on your form!

Gavin was AMAZING. I usually fall asleep in training and it didn’t happen in this class. Monday night’s reception was a great way to network with other professionals and the second day of class was even more engaging because we all felt more comfortable with each other.
This was my 13th year in a row attending an IAML program. These classes and instructors present real life situations that HR deals with every day. Classes are informative and fun!
The examples used and interactive nature of the course was very helpful. Excellent choice of facilitators - they knew the material and were very engaging.

IAML once again surpassed my expectations. The seminar was awesome and the degree of information presented to our group was so valuable.  I applaud IAML for finding the experts in the various fields and making them available to us. I can hardly wait until the next seminar!
I try to attend this update annually. It is always informative, entertaining and interesting. The instructors do a wonderful job. I never fail to learn something new.

The seminar was excellent. The instructors were extremely knowledgeable and made a point of allowing the class to interact. This one week not only provided me with knowledge I did not have, it also gave me a new appreciation for what I do.
testimonials.authorTitle: Executive Director, Strategic HR Business Partnerships - People & Culture

testimonials.quote: The seminar, in my opinion, was second to none. All of the information was very well delivered and explained in detail so that everyone, from the least to the most experienced, was able to understand. IAML did an outstanding job and I will be sure to highly recommend your seminars to anyone who inquires.

I found the seminar extremely educational. The instructors related the subject matter to each class attendant very well. They were very well spoken and allowed for great interaction with the group as well. The instructors knowledge and practical use of the subject matter translated into the class

Brenda was the best presenter/facilitator I have ever had in a classroom/conference. She was upbeat, entertaining and used real-world examples to help the students learn! She was fantastic! I look forward to attending another one of her seminars!

This was an excellent seminar and well worth the time and money invested. The instructors were very knowledgeable and interesting and their different styles were effective. The materials will be a great reference tool. This seminar was recommended by previous IAML participants and I will recommend it to others.

The program was very informative, the conversation and informal interaction with other participants was very useful. John was awesome with his delivery of the material and made every effort to address questions and topics that we raised.

Di Ann Sanchez was truly inspiring. She gave me the energy that I needed to continue in the field of HR. I would recommend her session to entry level HR professionals as well as a refresher for seasoned professionals.
Thank you for the insight and facilitated discussions. It was beneficial to hear about actual cases and learn how other HR professionals solve problems.
GREAT training. I hope to attend more IAML courses in the future.
This was my third IAML seminar and I have been very impressed each time. The information is comprehensive, in-depth, and very relevant. I plan to attend more IAML seminars in the future.
Very well done; an outstanding and interesting refresher. The IAML staff is also outstanding.
testimonials.company: Lake Erie College of Osteopathic Medicine

testimonials.quote: All compensation and benefits professionals should consider this seminar. There is a large volume of valuable information presented in an effective, dynamic setting. The speakers are certainly well-equipped and are very attuned to the needs of the class members.
Very good class with high quality instructors. The instructors were able to share many ‘real world’ examples from their own experiences which helped enhance the overall learning experience.
I have been to other seminars in the past but none compare to walking away from the IAML seminar with such a feeling of accomplishment. It was well worth the time and money. Thank you again!
My company regularly uses techniques that were discussed in the training seminar. It’s nice to see where these practices came from and that we are moving in the right direction!
The seminar offered incredible value for me. The instructors were able to rely on past examples and cases to help illustrate the learning. It was a great learning experience for me.

Information and materials were excellent, but the experiences shared by the facilitators was fantastic! Sam's interactive facilitation style really made the course very interesting and memorable. Thanks for a great course!
testimonials.company: Palm Beach County Tax Collector's Office

testimonials.quote: One of the best programs I've been to! Ray has a great sense of humor. Knowledge base of attendees was great and learned a lot from that interaction as well.
testimonials.authorTitle: Director of Talent Acquistion & Payroll Administration

testimonials.quote: This conference is one of the best methods to stay up-to-date in the ever-changing world of employment law.
I enjoyed the open and casual approach to this training. Everyone appeared comfortable enough to participate and ask questions.
Perfect!  Exactly what I hoped to gain. Delivery in such a fashion that kept everyone's attention. Already referring to materials, you have a lifelong customer!
Instructors did a great job and I enjoyed it so much. I liked their teaching styles, which made it so interesting and fun. I really wasn't ready to leave at the end of the week. Awesome team!

Thank you for all of the information that was given. I am very excited to apply the knowledge that has been given. I would very much like to continue to work with the IAML team to continue my education.

All three instructors were wonderful in their own way. Finding attorneys who can teach is a rarity.  I found the information current and relevant.  It will definitely have an impact on my HR practices.  Thank you for a great seminar!
Overall the material and training was great!  The instructor was informative. I will definitely recommend to others!

This was the best HR seminar that I have ever attended. It provided a thorough overview of critical HR information and was very well organized. The attorneys were humorous and understood the HR challenges that we face, they gave good advice.
Both facilitators were excellent! I will be able to use key learning tools from the seminar immediately within my organization. Thank you again for another awesome course!
Both instructors were very informative and presented very well. The knowledge I gained was great and the interaction was outstanding. Well worth the time and money.
I thoroughly enjoyed the seminar. I really appreciated that the instructors allowed participants to ask questions and work through our issues and concerns.
This is the best course I have ever attended. The instructors are well informed and have a repertoire of stories that emphasize the issues. Course materials are also excellent!
Excellent as usual! The instructors do a great job of covering recent court cases that may impact our decision making.
I thoroughly enjoyed the seminar. Thank you for so much valuable information and for great case examples.
The information was extremely valuable and interesting, I learned a great deal. The instructors did an exceptional job presenting; they were helpful, knowledgeable and entertaining.

I cannot emphasize enough how impressed I was with this seminar, especially the presenters, who were knowledgeable, interesting and effective. Their styles kept our attention, they encouraged discussion and answered questions definitively.
Fantastic instructor! He was able to keep everyone engaged and the seminar interactive. I feel more confident in my investigation skills after this seminar.
My only wish is that I had attended this seminar earlier in my career! The information I learned is invaluable.
This was an excellent seminar and covered everything I’d hoped. The instructors were outstanding.
Instructors were both knowledgeable, witty at times yet professional always! They naturally complement each other's teaching styles. Refreshed and learned a lot.

This is one of the best seminars I have ever attended. Our instructor was thoroughly engaging and his energy, enthusiasm and enjoyment of his subjects was infectious. I was sorry for it to end on Friday.
testimonials.authorTitle: Assistant General Counsel & Human Resources Director

testimonials.quote: I am a regular and will continue to attend and work with IAML. Material is up-to-date, pertinent and presented in an excellent manner.
This was a great program! One of the most useful programs I have attended in a long time. Instructors were awesome!
testimonials.company: Northern Virginia Criminal Justice Training Academy

testimonials.quote: Wayne Williams' intellect and energy truly made this an interactive session which is paramount for all adult learning. Kudos to him and to IAML!
Instructors were all first-rate. The presentations were well-crafted and extremely informative. I will highly recommend this seminar to my professional colleagues.
The instructor was excellent and did a great job at making materials exciting. She definitely deserves a raise! Great job Brenda!
Instructors were very good and well versed in subject matter. They offered to help and provide materials outside of the seminar.

Another outstanding conference. IAML and John Wymer continue to provide excellent training; and the information is always current and useful. There is never a doubt about the functional substance in an IAML conference.
Very difficult to find fault with this program. Both instructors were very passionate about their subjects and wanted us to learn.
I loved the case/scenario review. The small group setting allowed us the ability to ask questions. Although I was hesitant to do the role play I learned a lot from it.
The instructors did an excellent job with health care reform and their practical experience was enlightening.
I really enjoyed everything! I am new to HR and benefited so much from this seminar! IAML has an awesome staff! The instructors were excellent!

I am taking away so much more knowledge than what I had walking in to the room on the first day. Di Ann’s energy, enthusiasm, and passion made the class interesting and engaging. I am looking forward to sharing some of what I learned with my fellow co-workers, and begin to implement some positive changes.
Completely reversed my mindset on employment law. I was fascinated with the topic and would have enjoyed a couple of more days of the subject matter!
Both instructors were excellent! I liked the flexibility to discuss real issues and deviate from the planned topics to address questions. We then got back on track to cover all of the topics.

Presenter's extensive knowledge of the applicable law was evidenced throughout. They were able to give pertinent comments and recommendations, which should be highly effective upon implementation. All in all, wonderfully done seminar.
John Wymer filled every segment of the conference with practical advice and the legal reasoning to support it.

DiAnn Sanchez was extremely dynamic in her presentation skills and seemed to take a vested interest in our learning the information. I was very impressed with her background and appreciated hearing her personal experiences which help to bring the information to life!
Brenda was exceptional. She found the right balance of presenting employment law as it is written, while encouraging relevant experience sharing from participants and her own case work.
I thoroughly enjoyed the seminar and learned a great deal. Great networking environment.
This was by far, the best seminar I've ever attended! The materials provided are a great resource and the instructors did a great job of presenting the information.
The seminar was very good. It covered a lot of pertinent information. I felt I learned quite a bit that will have an immediate impact on my job.

Fantastic blend of “need to know” information with practical application. I appreciated the role playing and feedback to help us be better interviewers and investigators. The take-away information and tools were also excellent!

I found the seminar to be very informative and relevant. You certainly have two gems in Gavin and Wayne. Their knowledge of the subject matter and the ease in which they interact with the attendees made the seminar a true success. I have stated as much to the powers that be here in a formal memo, and have recommended the seminar to other managers.
The instructors did a great job of keeping the participants engaged while covering material that could have been very dry.

I really enjoyed the class. I appreciated Tom Schendt’s teaching styles and how he involved everyone in the class and made it interactive. He certainly succeeded in making a potentially boring subject quite fun.

Excellent experience! The seminar was very enlightening and I highly recommend it to anyone trying to learn more about employment law and how it applies to their everyday experiences working with employees.
The instructors were very knowledgeable. It was a great seminar. I have been in HR for 12 years and still learned a lot!

It was an excellent seminar and I learned quite a bit. The speakers were great.  The information was relevant, current, helpful and could be immediately applied. All in all, it was an excellent event and I'm already budgeting for the Advanced session next year.
This program was so much more than I expected it to be. Never have I left a seminar so fulfilled and eager to put my new knowledge to work at the office. Thanks IAML!
Both instructors were amazing and talented women. They kept the entire class engaged and eager to learn the entire time. I highly recommend them!
John Wymer was, as always, excellent! His knowledge of current case law and ease of interaction with the class is exceptional.
testimonials.authorTitle: Sr. Vice President - Chief Human Resources Officer & Lead Negotiations Advisor

testimonials.quote: Engaging and knowledgeable instructor made the class interactive and the learning fun.

This seminar is fantastic for both novice and seasoned HR folks. I would strongly recommend that this program be mandatory for non-HR employees as well. General supervisors and managers will see a huge benefit in understanding human resources.

Each instructor was extremely knowledgeable in their subject matter. High energy, great class environment. Most importantly, I want to say that Di Ann Sanchez’ real world application of the laws, her best practices advice was great!
The seminar was the best. Faculty did an outstanding job of making legal information understandable for non-lawyer professionals. I am planning to attend the Advanced Conference.
Wayne turned what I dreaded to be five days of boring lecture into insightful and lively discussions.
testimonials.authorTitle: Global Talent Acquisition Leader, Biotechnology Group

testimonials.quote: Amy is an extremely knowledgeable professional with years of labor relations experience. This is invaluable to have as an instructor.  She gained immediate credibility with the group with her extensive knowledge, experience and life anecdotes.
Having everyone participate and practice was an effective way to work on our interview skills, and at the same time challenge some techniques that are possibly outdated or ineffective.
John Wymer is one of the best labor/employment attorneys in the country. It’s hard not to learn something from him!

One of the best training seminars I’ve attended! Very valuable to what I do every day, especially in reviewing litigation cases. There was much value in the interaction with other HR peers. Thank you for the valued experience!
This seminar provided a 'big bang for the buck'.  Well worth the time and energy. Information that was presented was timely and relevant.
Brenda Heinicke was outstanding! Energetic, informative, informal, interesting and easy to understand. Outstanding use of examples, scenarios and hypothetical situations. I highly recommend her.
Outstanding conference. One of the best I've been to!  John Wymer presenting made the 'could-be dry' tropics into interesting topics and he kept the group going. Great presenter!

The Advanced Certificate in Employment Law presented by Ray Deeny is by far the best conference I have attended. Ray’s in-depth knowledge of all aspects of employment law is amazing. I have never walked out of an IAML program without learning something that I could apply immediately. Hands-down the best value for your money. If you can choose only one employment law conference, this is the one!
Great conference as usual. The instructors are terrific and the information they present will definitely help keep our management out of trouble.
Just what I needed – ‘real world’ legal examples from someone on the employers side.
I thought IAML provided an incredible instructor. The program was engaging, dynamic, and incredibly informative. I’d give him more than 2 thumbs-up if I had more hands.

This is the third time I've taken this conference in the last five years. John and Ray present very insightful information in an entertaining and enjoyable way. It will keep me coming back for a refresher every few years.

The vast knowledge and experience of the instructors; entertaining and dynamic presentation style; discussion method of training was well received; linkage of legal facts to actual cases was enlightening.

Both instructors were extremely knowledgeable and well versed in their content matter. I enjoyed Jackie Kalk's pithy approach to instruction and gained much knowledge from the examples that she included during discussion. She utilized varied teaching strategies in order to actively engage all participants and promoted an interactive learning environment and advocated open discussion. Overall, I really enjoyed the seminar.  It was very beneficial to my career as well as my personal development.
I really enjoyed the engaging presence of your faculty. I took away a greater knowledge of conducting investigations by the end of the course and have quite a few things to share with my team.
It was a great experience, and I am very thankful that I was allowed the opportunity to attend. I will look forward to more opportunities in the future.
What a wonderful experience. Great instructors and information. The materials provided are invaluable.
Brenda Heinicke was fantastic. She used a very common sense approach to communicate best HR practices.
Excellent course for establishing a foundation in conducting investigations.
testimonials.authorTitle: Sr. Director, Employee and Labor Relations

testimonials.quote: Always enjoy this seminar. It really means a lot to fully trust the information that I receive from these wonderful instructors. We, as HR professionals, are very fortunate for their participation in your program.
John was absolutely amazing! I learned so much from him – I could have stayed an entire week to listen to him. He is a phenomenal educator.
Different subject matter, different instructors, different style of instructors, all complement the overall experience.
You all conveyed an excitement about the topics that carried through all the presentations. Having presenters with a lot of experience was great. Life experiences are always best.

This was the fifth Advanced Certificate in Employment Law Conference I've attended and, as usual, it was GREAT. I attend other HR related conferences from time to time and I have to say, IAML sets the standard. None of the others come close. Keep up the great work.
With almost 20 years in the field of employment law, this was one of the best, if not the best, seminar I have ever attended.

IAML is my ‘go-to’ source for continuing education to ensure I am current in employment law. John Wymer consistently provides applicable case studies and ‘real life’ interpretations of the law. He keeps the class entertained while at the same time providing us with tips we can implement immediately in our own companies.
Another excellent course! The instructor managed to make what could be considered rather 'dry' material interesting, humorous and thought-provoking!
